lane: Source thumbnails and visual evidence integrity
latest_update: Implemented validated-only source thumbnail policy; Open Graph/Twitter/schema images are SSRF-guarded, redirects are rechecked, no-thumbnail fallbacks explain missing/blocked imagery, and generated/local visual evidence art is rejected as source evidence. Required tests, TypeScript, scoped lint, and browser screenshots passed.
blocker: No blocker. Devorah should still own broader production SSRF/rate-limit policy beyond this thumbnail validation slice.
